name: Paracetamol 650mg
shortDescription: Fast relief for fever, headache, and mild body pain.
description: Paracetamol 650mg offers effective symptomatic relief from fever and common aches. Best used exactly as labelled and with proper hydration.

name: Ibuprofen 400mg
shortDescription: Anti-inflammatory support for pain, swelling, and cramps.
description: Ibuprofen 400mg helps reduce inflammation and discomfort linked to headaches, muscle strains, and menstrual cramps.

name: Cetirizine 10mg
shortDescription: Daily antihistamine support for allergy symptoms.
description: Cetirizine is commonly used for sneezing, runny nose, itchy eyes, and seasonal allergy relief.

name: Amoxicillin 500mg
shortDescription: Antibiotic treatment support for bacterial infections.
description: Amoxicillin should only be taken when prescribed by a licensed clinician and completed for the full recommended course.

name: Metformin 500mg
shortDescription: Routine glucose management for type 2 diabetes care.
description: Metformin 500mg supports blood sugar management and is generally taken alongside meal planning and regular physician follow-up.

name: Glimepiride 2mg
shortDescription: Additional glycemic support for prescribed diabetes plans.
description: Glimepiride is part of prescription diabetes management and should be used with clinician guidance to reduce hypoglycemia risk.

name: Vitamin D3
shortDescription: Bone and immunity support in easy daily softgels.
description: Vitamin D3 helps maintain bone strength and healthy immune response, especially in people with low sun exposure.

name: Vitamin C Effervescent
shortDescription: Refreshingly soluble immunity support tablets.
description: Vitamin C effervescent tablets dissolve quickly in water and support daily immune health and antioxidant intake.

name: Omega-3 Softgels
shortDescription: Heart and brain support with purified fish oil.
description: Omega-3 softgels offer EPA and DHA support for cardiovascular wellness as part of a balanced diet.

name: Atorvastatin 10mg
shortDescription: Prescription lipid management for long-term heart health.
description: Atorvastatin is a prescription medicine used to help manage cholesterol and reduce cardiovascular risk.

name: Aspirin 75mg
shortDescription: Low-dose antiplatelet support when advised clinically.
description: Low-dose aspirin may be prescribed for certain heart-related conditions and should only be used with medical guidance.

name: Pantoprazole 40mg
shortDescription: Acid control support for reflux and gastritis care.
description: Pantoprazole reduces stomach acid and is often prescribed for reflux, ulcers, and related digestive conditions.

name: Oral Rehydration Salts
shortDescription: Rapid electrolyte replacement for dehydration recovery.
description: ORS sachets help restore fluid and electrolytes lost during heat, vomiting, or diarrhea.

name: Zinc Plus
shortDescription: Immune and recovery support with zinc supplementation.
description: Zinc Plus supports immune function and daily nutritional coverage when dietary intake is inadequate.

name: CoQ10 Capsules
shortDescription: Cellular energy and cardiovascular wellness support.
description: CoQ10 is a dietary supplement commonly used to support heart health, energy metabolism, and antioxidant balance.

name: Amlodipine 5mg
shortDescription: Prescription blood pressure control support.
description: Amlodipine is prescribed to manage blood pressure and should be used exactly as directed by a healthcare professional.

name: Azithromycin 500mg
shortDescription: Short-course antibiotic used for select bacterial infections.
description: Azithromycin is prescription-only and should only be taken when medically indicated for bacterial infection treatment.

name: Calcium Magnesium
shortDescription: Dual mineral support for bones, nerves, and muscles.
description: Calcium Magnesium combines two essential minerals for daily bone and muscle support.

name: Insulin Glargine Pen
shortDescription: Long-acting insulin support for prescribed diabetes management.
description: Insulin glargine helps control blood sugar over an extended period and should be used under medical supervision.

name: Multivitamin for Women
shortDescription: Daily micronutrient blend for energy, immunity, and wellness.
description: A balanced multivitamin tailored for everyday support, including iron, B vitamins, and antioxidants.

name: Digestive Relief Gel
shortDescription: Soothing relief for acidity, bloating, and indigestion.
description: This antacid gel offers quick digestive comfort for occasional acidity and heartburn symptoms.
